_comment: Not a GitHub Ruleset — apply these manually under repo Settings. Issues/PRs are open; delivery to main requires your review via the branch ruleset + CODEOWNERS.

collaborators_guidance.note: Fork → open PR → CI runs (after your approval for first-time contributors) → you review as CODEOWNER → merge. No direct push to main except admin bypass.

required_signatures.reason: Commits are currently unsigned; enable in ruleset (required_signatures) once you set up SSH commit signing.

tag_ruleset.suggestion: Add a second ruleset on refs/tags/v* with required_signatures before publishing releases.
